name: task-queue reporting system
description: 用户明确要求任务队列报告必须成为主动维护的执行队列，并在飞书中定期展示进度

payload.summary: 用户明确要求任务队列报告必须成为主动维护的执行队列，并在飞书中定期展示进度
payload.evidence: Task-queue reporting must not stop at static backlog files or diagnostic reports. It must become an actively maintained execution queue, preferably shown in Feishu chat, and periodic global progress summaries should be inserted every few queue reports.
payload.description: 用户明确要求任务队列报告必须成为主动维护的执行队列，并在飞书中定期展示进度
